name: amis-bug-driven-improvements
description: Close Flux design/test gaps surfaced by mining amis historical bug-fix history (1785 issues → 214 signals in docs/components/amis-bug-driven-improvements/). Each signal is a Flux-first generic correctness property, NOT amis-parity: design gaps (DESIGN-GAP, owner doc silent → add decision), test gaps (TEST-GAP, design claims it → add regression test), locks (LOCK, design correct → regression anchor), and explicitly-rejected amis designs (NOT-ADOPTED). Driven by amis-bug-driven-improvement-roadmap.md. P0+P1 signals (109) span 6 themed waves B1–B6 (validation dependency closure, async request/scope, table/CRUD row-identity, form-field controlled-value, surfaces/display/i18n, action-graph/button/cards/condition-builder/styling); P2/P3 (103) in B7 backlog. Requests sink to data-source; unified `when`; shadcn/ui naming; no amis valueField/joinValues/delimiter, no level/actionType discriminator, no themeCss/mobileUI, no frontend export, no echarts. amis is reference only, NOT the yardstick. Complements (does not duplicate) existing-components-improvement-roadmap (E0/E1/E2/X all done) — this mission only adds tests/design boundaries those waves left untested.
